title: Copper Rockets
description: This mod adds 5 new firework rockets to use with your elytra. Worry not about making thousands of rockets, when you can just make one of the new copper rockets!
body:
# **Overview**

**This mod adds 5 new firework rockets to use with your elytra. Worry not about making thousands of rockets, when you can just make one the new copper rockets!**

- Copper Rocket
- Iron Rocket
- Golden Rocket
- Diamond Rocket
- Netherite Rocket

**Also adds 3 new enchants:**

- Zoom 1-3: Increases Rocket boost speed.
- Launching: Launches you when you right click a block; incompatible with Zoom.
- Overboost 1-3: Increases the effects of both previous enchantments.

The rockets also support Unbreaking!
